metadata.name: AETHERUS Interface Contract
metadata.boundary: This file defines static contract shapes for future Interface Layer alignment. It does not implement backend runtime, authentication, persistence, model calls, live orchestration, NEXUS integration, or ledger behavior.

runtime_status_vocabulary.description: Maturity labels for interface objects, fixtures, traces, and future runtime boundaries.

values.public_claim_boundary: May describe deterministic browser-side fixture simulation only.
Requires implemented local runtime evidence before use.
Requires verified NEXUS adapter implementation before use.
Requires backend trace service evidence before use.
Requires authentication and actor identity implementation before use.
Requires production architecture, verification, security, deployment, and evidence review before use.

scenario.description: A named governance trace fixture or future run descriptor.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable scenario identifier.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable scenario title.

fields.name: scenario_input
fields.description: Structured input frame. Currently represented by scenario metadata and payload references, not real runtime input.

fields.name: governance_manifest_reference
fields.description: Reference to the static manifest version or future executable governance manifest.

fields.name: gate_results
fields.description: Fixture-driven gate outcomes in the current site.

fields.name: verdict
fields.description: Fixture-selected verdict for the deterministic trace.

fields.name: decision_explanation
fields.description: Reviewer-facing explanation of the deterministic fixture outcome.

fields.name: evidence_requirements
fields.description: Missing evidence required before operational claims could be made.

fields.name: trace_events
fields.description: Illustrative in-memory events unless generated by an implemented runtime.

fields.name: runtime_status
fields.description: Explicit maturity boundary for this scenario.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Gate identifier such as G_IDEMPOTENCY, G1A, VAL-SAFE-001, or schema_validation.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Human-readable label.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Source marker such as joint-workflow, derived, or aetherus-interface.

fields.name: validator_reference
fields.description: Future implemented validator reference. Not present in the static site.

gate_result.description: Outcome of a gate for one fixture or future run.

fields.name: gate_id
fields.description: Gate evaluated by the fixture.

fields.name: status
fields.description: pass, fail, escalate, cache_hit, blocked, or equivalent bounded status.

fields.name: input_artifact_ref
fields.description: Future reference to real input artifact.

fields.name: validator_version
fields.description: Future validator identity required for reproducible runtime results.

verdict.description: Terminal or branch decision emitted by static fixture logic or future executable gates.

fields.name: status
fields.description: pass, fail, or escalate.

fields.name: subtype
fields.description: Bounded subtype such as cache_hit, blocking_error, or critical_schema_failure.

fields.name: derived_from_gate_results
fields.description: Future marker that verdict was calculated from executable gate evidence.

decision_explanation.description: Human-readable account of why a deterministic fixture or future run produced its verdict.

fields.name: why_verdict
fields.description: Concise explanation of the result.

fields.name: determining_condition
fields.description: Condition selected by the fixture or later observed by runtime validators.

fields.name: decisive_rule_or_gate
fields.description: Gate or rule that controlled the outcome.

evidence_requirement.description: Operational evidence gap that must be satisfied before stronger claims can be made.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Evidence requirement name.

fields.name: required_for_status
fields.description: Runtime maturity status that would require this evidence.

fields.name: evidence_present
fields.description: Must remain false unless implementation evidence exists.

artifact_reference.description: Pointer to a supporting artifact, schema, patchlist, origin commit, or evidence module.

fields.name: ref
fields.description: Local evidence id or future runtime artifact pointer.

fields.name: integrity_ref
fields.description: Future integrity marker. Not a current hash or ledger proof.

fields.name: retention_policy_ref
fields.description: Future retention model reference.

release_eligibility.description: Explanation of whether a fixture or future run is eligible for release.

fields.name: eligible
fields.description: Current value is fixture-selected.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Human-readable release eligibility label.

fields.name: evidence_basis
fields.description: Future basis for operational eligibility.

trace_event.description: Event-like representation of a step in a fixture or future run.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Deterministic display id in current traces. Not a real hash or ledger id.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Must identify current events as illustrative in-memory trace events.

fields.name: append_only_proof
fields.description: Future ledger-related proof. Not currently implemented.

fields.name: actor_identity
fields.description: Future authenticated actor identity.

handoff_receipt.description: Validation record for material passed between Joint-Workflow joints.

fields.name: joint
fields.description: Receiving or validating joint.

fields.name: validation
fields.description: complete, incomplete, rejected, or equivalent bounded state.

fields.name: received
fields.description: Fixture-listed received materials.

fields.name: signed_by_actor
fields.description: Future authenticated receipt signer.

joint_workflow_reference.description: Reference from interface object to Joint-Workflow execution-semantics source material.

fields.name: component
fields.description: Joint, gate, template, receipt, or policy component name.

fields.name: source_section
fields.description: Source section label from Joint-Workflow-derived manifest.

fields.name: executable_binding
fields.description: Future executable binding, if implemented and verified.

nexus_adapter_boundary.description: Future adapter boundary between AETHERUS Interface Layer objects and verified NEXUS MVP semantics.

fields.name: nexus_repository_ref
fields.description: Pinned NEXUS repository, branch, and commit. Not currently present.

fields.name: input_mapping
fields.description: Future mapping from interface contract objects to NEXUS input.

fields.name: output_mapping
fields.description: Future mapping from NEXUS output to interface contract objects.

fields.name: integration_status
fields.description: Must remain not_currently_implemented until adapter evidence exists.

allowed_current: public seed of the AETHERUS Interface Layer
claim-bounded representation of governance stack, evidence modules, and scenario-based decision explanation
